name: Frozen/GENDERBEND
description:
(Villain user AU)

I FINISH THE THING. I'll try it; if you see any incorrect information, please let me know.

THIS IS A FAN-MADE MAP

(Not mine of course)

There's lore from the book, not just the movie, so if you see names or anything you don't recognize, Google it first.

If a character named Caspar appears, whoever knows him, I made him an young adult (19 years old) because of what Janitor asks, obviously, but he is also a secondary character, not really relevant.
creator: Mandarigato
